profile-a.summary: 整体健康数据看起来不错。HRV 和睡眠质量保持稳定，建议继续保持当前的运动和作息习惯。
microTips: 建议每天保持 7-8 小时的睡眠
您的 HRV 趋势稳定，说明自主神经系统调节良好

profile-b.summary: 近期健康数据有波动。睡眠时长偏短，建议关注作息规律，适当增加运动。
microTips: 睡眠时间不足 6 小时，建议尽量提前就寝
每天增加 2000 步可有效改善心肺功能

profile-c.summary: 健康数据提示存在压力过大和睡眠不足的问题，建议重点关注压力管理和作息调整。
microTips: 压力负荷持续偏高，建议每天进行 10 分钟冥想或深呼吸
睡眠严重不足，建议设定固定就寝时间并避免睡前使用电子设备

profile-a.summary: Overall health data looks good. HRV and sleep quality remain stable. Keep up your current exercise and sleep routine.
microTips: Aim for 7-8 hours of sleep every night
Your HRV trend is stable, indicating healthy autonomic nervous system regulation

profile-b.summary: Recent health data shows some fluctuation. Sleep duration is on the shorter side. Consider maintaining a consistent schedule and increasing physical activity.
microTips: You're getting less than 6 hours of sleep — try going to bed earlier
Adding 2,000 daily steps can effectively improve cardiovascular fitness

profile-c.summary: Health data indicates elevated stress levels and insufficient sleep. Prioritize stress management and sleep schedule adjustments.
microTips: Stress load remains high — try 10 minutes of daily meditation or deep breathing
Sleep is severely lacking. Set a fixed bedtime and avoid screens before sleep
